name: Skills-Architects-HK
description: Hong Kong architect skill variant — Buildings Ordinance Cap. 123, BEAM Plus, OZP/HKPSG, high-density typologies (HA/HD, MTR TOD, composite buildings, village houses), and HK architectural culture.

author.name: Rico Kwok
author.copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Rico Kwok. All rights reserved.

skills.name: hk-architect-foundations
skills.description: Auto-activated foundation: HK architect references, BO metrics, HKPSG, typology taxonomy, skill router

skills.name: hk-accessibility-design
skills.description: DMBA 2008, PNAP APP-152, accessible routes, ramps, lifts, tactile paving, MTR interface

skills.name: hk-acoustic-design
skills.description: EPD noise guidelines, MTR/KCR railway noise, EIAO TM, BEAM Plus IEQ acoustic, CNP Cap.400

skills.name: hk-architect-calculator
skills.description: GFA/PR (BO + PNAP APP-2), OTTV/RTTV, occupant load, MOE exit width — metric, HK codes

skills.name: hk-building-codes
skills.description: Buildings Ordinance Cap. 123, GFA/PR calculations, means of escape, fire safety, barrier-free access

skills.name: hk-building-envelope
skills.description: OTTV/RTTV, BEAM Plus energy, HKWC typhoon wind, curtain wall, CZ 1A subtropical durability

skills.name: hk-building-programming
skills.description: BO use classifications, HKPSG facility ratios, HA/HD unit schedules, FEHD licensing constraints

skills.name: hk-building-services
skills.description: CoP EE 2021 HVAC, HK Wiring Regs (220V/50Hz), WSD/DSD drainage, EPD, FSD coordination

skills.name: hk-building-sustainability
skills.description: BEAM Plus NB/EB, OTTV/RTTV, EMSD BEC, subtropical climate strategies

skills.name: hk-building-typology
skills.description: HA/HD public housing, MTR TOD, composite buildings, NT village houses, Grade A office, heritage reuse

skills.name: hk-concept-design
skills.description: HKIA/BD submission stages, OZP/BHR massing, AVA, BEAM Plus at concept, podium-tower, MTR TOD

skills.name: hk-construction-documentation
skills.description: BD statutory submissions, AP/RSE/RC, OP process, PNAP references, GS spec, Minor Works Cap.123N

skills.name: hk-daylighting-design
skills.description: BO Reg.30, BEAM Plus IEQ daylight, subtropical solar geometry (22.3°N), urban canyon simulation

skills.name: hk-design-theory
skills.description: Critical regionalism in HK, vertical urbanism, HK architect references, heritage theory (AAB/AMO)

skills.name: hk-fire-life-safety
skills.description: FS Code 2011, BO Reg.41, FSD/BD approval, MOE, sprinklers, compartmentation, scissor stairs

skills.name: hk-material-selection
skills.description: BEAM Plus Materials credits, marine/subtropical durability, typhoon-resistant cladding, regional sourcing

skills.name: hk-spatial-planning
skills.description: OZP zoning, HKPSG, s.16/s.12A planning applications, AVA, urban design guidelines

skills.name: hk-structural-systems
